examples: The recent discovery of a pterosaur specimen covered in long, dense, and relatively thick hairlike fossil material was the first clear evidence that his reasoning was correct.
This is huge for a pterosaur.
About 160 million years ago, a female pterosaur with an injured wing dropped from the sky into a watery grave.
They have since been identified as belonging to a newly-identified species of the flying pterosaur.
Dinosaur fan Daisy Morris, nine, from Whitwell, was five when she found the pterosaur fossil on a local beach.
